waiting_room.title: Waiting Room
waiting_room.submitted_desc: Your registration is currently under review by our community administrators. We will contact you or update your account status shortly.
waiting_room.activation_notice: Once an admin grants approval, your account will be activated with appropriate application access mappings.
waiting_room.form_intro: Please complete your local community profile details to request access to ecosystem applications.
waiting_room.role_in_community: Who are you in this community?
waiting_room.whatsapp_hint: Used solely by administrators for verification.

validation.house_number_max_length: House number must be 25 characters or less
validation.whatsapp_max_length: WhatsApp number must be 25 characters or less

owner.label: Owner
owner.description: You are the legal owner of this house.

renter.label: Renter
renter.description: You are the primary renter of this house.

household_member.label: Household Member
household_member.description: Select this option if you live in the house but are not the owner or primary renter.
examples: Other family member living in the house

caretaker.label: Caretaker
caretaker.description: You are responsible for guarding or supervising this house.

ipl_finder.description: Search, index, and manage bank e-statements and CSV records. Active document audit trail.

rekap_viewer.description: Fly.io cached backend display for Sheets logs, reports, and real-time community summaries.

community_docs.description: Governed, searchable access to official community documents, handbook regulations, and meeting records.

kas_management.description: Decentralized cashbook treasury, monthly billing tracking, and balance sheet reporting.

surat_admin.description: Instant official resident correspondence generation and custom PDF permit drafting tools.

rejected.title: Registration Rejected
rejected.alert_title: Your account registration was rejected by an administrator.
rejected.alert_desc: Your credentials have been checked but do not match our authorized community member directory, or your submitted house verification could not be confirmed.
rejected.appeal_notice: If you believe this is a mistake or wish to appeal this decision, please reach out to the community association administration office directly.

login.description: Sign in using your authorized community Google account to access Veryresto ecosystem applications (IPL Finder, Rekap, Kas, Surat).
login.footer_notice: Protected by Community Governance policies. Unauthorized access is recorded.
